original_text: A journey of a thousand miles begins beneath one's feet.
ja_translation: 千里の道も、足もとの一歩から始まる。
en_translation: A journey of a thousand miles begins beneath one's feet.

original_text: Well begun is half done.
ja_translation: よい始まりは、仕事の半ばに等しい。
en_translation: Well begun is half done.

original_text: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge.
ja_translation: 知っていることを知っているとし、知らないことを知らないとする。それが真の知である。
en_translation: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge.

original_text: Hatred does not cease by hatred at any time: hatred ceases by love; this is an old rule.
ja_translation: 憎しみは、憎しみによっては決してやまない。憎しみは、愛によってこそやむ。これは古くからの真理である。
en_translation: Hatred does not cease by hatred at any time: hatred ceases by love; this is an old rule.

original_text: It is impossible for anyone to begin to learn that which he thinks he already knows.
ja_translation: 自分はすでに知っていると思っていることを、人は学び始めることができない。
en_translation: It is impossible for anyone to begin to learn that which he thinks he already knows.

original_text: While we wait for life, life passes.
ja_translation: 生きる準備をしているうちに、人生は過ぎていく。
en_translation: While we wait for life, life passes.

original_text: The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
ja_translation: 宇宙は変化であり、私たちの人生は思考のあり方によって形づくられる。
en_translation: The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.

original_text: Reading maketh a full man, conference a ready man, and writing an exact man.
ja_translation: 読書は人を豊かにし、対話は人を機敏にし、書くことは人を正確にする。
en_translation: Reading maketh a full man, conference a ready man, and writing an exact man.

original_text: I think, therefore I am.
source: Discourse on the Method, Part IV
ja_translation: 我思う、ゆえに我あり。
en_translation: I think, therefore I am.

original_text: Let us endeavor to think well; this is the principle of morality.
ja_translation: よく考えるよう努めよう。そこに道徳の原理がある。
en_translation: Let us endeavor to think well; this is the principle of morality.

original_text: There is nothing either good or bad, but thinking makes it so.
ja_translation: 物事に善し悪しがあるのではない。そう考える心がそれを決めるのだ。
en_translation: There is nothing either good or bad, but thinking makes it so.

original_text: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.
ja_translation: 私がより遠くを見通せたとすれば、それは巨人たちの肩の上に立っていたからだ。
en_translation: If I have seen further it is by standing on the shoulders of Giants.

original_text: Well done is better than well said.
ja_translation: うまく語るより、うまくやるほうがよい。
en_translation: Well done is better than well said.

original_text: There is no charm equal to tenderness of heart.
ja_translation: 心のやさしさに勝る魅力はない。
en_translation: There is no charm equal to tenderness of heart.

original_text: I learned this, at least, by my experiment: that if one advances confidently in the direction of his dreams, and endeavours to live the life which he has imagined, he will meet with a success unexpected in common hours.
ja_translation: 少なくとも私の経験から学んだのはこういうことだ。自分の夢の方向へ自信をもって進み、自分が思い描いた人生を生きようと努めるなら、ふだんは思いもよらない成功に出会う。
en_translation: I learned this, at least, by my experiment: that if one advances confidently in the direction of his dreams, and endeavours to live the life which he has imagined, he will meet with a success unexpected in common hours.

original_text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
ja_translation: 人生は振り返って初めて理解できる。しかし、生きるのは前に向かってでなければならない。
en_translation: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.

original_text: The evil that is in the world always comes of ignorance, and good intentions may do as much harm as malevolence, if they lack understanding.
ja_translation: この世界の悪は、つねに無知から生まれる。理解を欠けば、善意ですら悪意と同じほどの害をもたらしうる。
en_translation: The evil that is in the world always comes of ignorance, and good intentions may do as much harm as malevolence, if they lack understanding.

original_text: Security is mostly a superstition. It does not exist in nature... Life is either a daring adventure, or nothing.
ja_translation: 安全とは、たいてい迷信にすぎない。自然界にそれは存在しない。人生は果敢な冒険であるか、さもなくば無である。
en_translation: Security is mostly a superstition. It does not exist in nature... Life is either a daring adventure, or nothing.

original_text: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.
ja_translation: 港にいる船は安全だ。だが、船はそのために造られたのではない。
en_translation: A ship in harbor is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.

original_text: The future cannot be predicted, but futures can be invented.
ja_translation: 未来を予言することはできない。しかし、未来を創り出すことはできる。
en_translation: The future cannot be predicted, but futures can be invented.

original_text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance you must keep moving.
ja_translation: 人生は自転車に乗るようなものだ。バランスを保つには、動き続けなければならない。
en_translation: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance you must keep moving.

original_text: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity.
ja_translation: いちばん難しいのは行動すると決めることだ。あとは、ただ粘り強さの問題にすぎない。
en_translation: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity.

original_text: Love is the only way to grasp another human being in the innermost core of his personality.
ja_translation: 愛こそが、他者の人格の最も深い核心を理解するための唯一の道である。
en_translation: Love is the only way to grasp another human being in the innermost core of his personality.

original_text: Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.
ja_translation: どこかにある不正は、あらゆる場所の正義に対する脅威である。
en_translation: Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.

original_text: Without courage, you can't practice any other virtue consistently.
ja_translation: 勇気がなければ、ほかのどんな徳も一貫して実践することはできない。
en_translation: Without courage, you can't practice any other virtue consistently.

original_text: When I dare to be powerful, to use my strength in the service of my vision, then it becomes less and less important whether I am afraid.
ja_translation: 自分の力を、自分のビジョンに奉仕させるために大胆に使うとき、恐れているかどうかはしだいに重要ではなくなる。
en_translation: When I dare to be powerful, to use my strength in the service of my vision, then it becomes less and less important whether I am afraid.

original_text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
ja_translation: 偉大な仕事をするための唯一の方法は、自分のしていることを愛することだ。
en_translation: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.

original_text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
source: as quoted in Long Walk to Freedom
ja_translation: 物事は、やり遂げるまではいつも不可能に見えるものだ。
en_translation: It always seems impossible until it's done.

original_text: It is impossible to care for each other more or differently than we care for the earth.
ja_translation: 私たちは、この地球を大切にする以上に、あるいは別の仕方で、互いを大切にすることはできない。
en_translation: It is impossible to care for each other more or differently than we care for the earth.

original_text: Do all the good you can, by all the means you can, in all the ways you can, in all the places you can, at all the times you can, to all the people you can, as long as ever you can.
source: Rule of Conduct, Letters of John Wesley
ja_translation: できるかぎりの善を、できるあらゆる手段で、できるあらゆる方法で、できるあらゆる場所で、できるあらゆる時に、できるあらゆる人に対して、できるかぎり長く行いなさい。
en_translation: Do all the good you can, by all the means you can, in all the ways you can, in all the places you can, at all the times you can, to all the people you can, as long as ever you can.

original_text: One never notices what has been done; one can only see what remains to be done.
ja_translation: 人は成し遂げたことにはなかなか目を向けず、ただ、まだ残っていることばかりを見るものだ。
en_translation: One never notices what has been done; one can only see what remains to be done.
